title: Sabatier Professional Kitchen Paring Knife – 3.5 inch/9 cm Full Tang Blade, Forged High Graded Stainless Steel, Twin Rivet Comfort Handle
features: The 3.5 inch paring knife is perfect for intricate tasks like peeling, garnishing, and slicing small fruits or vegetables. Made from high-graded stainless steel, it offers sharpness and durability, while the full tang and twin rivet handle provide a secure and comfortable grip for precise cuts. Size: 3.5 inch/9 cm.
